title: INDEX prevents JOIN from discovering matches
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TEST1 ( one String NOT NULL, two Int32 DEFAULT 0, three Date );
CREATE TABLE TEST2 ( one String NOT NULL, two Int32, four Float32 );
SELECT * FROM TEST1 JOIN TEST2 ON TEST1.one = TEST2.one AND TEST1.two = TEST2.two;
key_bug_features: INDEX on TEST1 disrupts JOIN match discovery
